generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring ambient temperature in Living Lab building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightIntensitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring light intensity for visual comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightIntensityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy detection sensor for space utilization monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightIntensityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightIntensitySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightIntensityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light intensity data for visual comfort optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightIntensityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy data for space utilization and HVAC control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightingDimmer : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for controlling lighting intensity in building spaces"
]

instance HVACValve : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for regulating HVAC system flow rates"
]

instance WindowActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for opening/closing windows in Building Control System"
]

instance Revit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tool for creating and managing building information models"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT messaging platform for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform for synchronization and metadata handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAnalysisService, NonVisualHealthEffectAssessmentService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization platform for interactive 3D building model rendering"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance LivingLabBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with runtime metadata (device IDs, control logic) for semantic backbone"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Revit, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of building systems for real-time status updates"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building systems for scenario analysis and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for energy consumption optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionPrediction
]

instance VisualComfortAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing light levels to optimize visual comfort in building spaces"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortOptimizationInsight
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectAssessmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Assessment service for non-visual health impacts from environmental conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthImpactInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building models using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides Interactive3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance EnergyConsumptionPrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption to support facility management decisions"
]

instance VisualComfortOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insights for visual comfort through lighting analysis"
]

instance NonVisualHealthImpactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of non-visual health effects from lighting and environmental factors"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational status insights for building systems"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for scenario-based building optimization"
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization insights for building model exploration"
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab building infrastructure with integrated physical assets for unified virtual modeling"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, LightIntensitySensor, OccupancySensor, LightingDimmer, HVACValve, WindowActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by DT services (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto to actuators in the physical building."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data ingestion from sensors and immediate control signal execution to actuators."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized framework coordinating BIM-based semantic models, Hono/Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine visualization, and modular services via standardized extension points to enable scalable, service-oriented DT deployment."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Encompasses all building life cycle phases, from design and construction through operations and refurbishment, with the DT serving as a dynamic representation throughout."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure interoperability and architectural soundness of the DT implementation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional real-time data exchange between physical assets and the digital twin."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards (e.g., IFC), Eclipse Hono/Ditto for IoT data standards, and standardized extension points for service integration."
]
